title: chionolaena arbuscula
intro: Chionolaena arbuscula, a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. Chionolaena arbuscula is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
